title: juncus durus
intro: Juncus durus, also known as Hard Rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family, characterized by its rigid, woody stems and fibrous leaves. Traditionally, Hard Rush has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus durus include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and aid in the healing process. Herbal preparations of Juncus durus often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and rhizomes, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and reduce swelling.
